name: Jessica's Apricot Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups duck sauce, or more jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat chicken pieces in flour.
2. Dip in egg.
3. Roll in matzo meal.
4. Bake at 350F for 30 minutes.
5. Bring remaining ingredients to a boil and pour over chicken.
6. Bake for an additional hour at 350F.
7. Bake for one more hour at 300F.
8. Mushrooms may be added during the last hour of baking.
